no: Kale BG1 Fighter, optional Warden kit Requires wb:1 to install during BG1 phase — references BG1 DLG resources (HALFGU.DLG and other BG1 NPCs) not available in BG2EE. Patched Emily.d: removed Isaac (X3ISAACB) crossmod blocks - Isaac is commented out in Skitia NPCs. WARNING: EXTEND_TOP #position 4 out of range (×9) patching BDIMOEN.DLG. Off-by-one in SoD Imoen dialog patching. Cosmetic. Automated fix: eet-mod-forge-patches component #16.
notes: Kale mod bug: CrossMod/Emily.d references X3ISAACB.DLG (Isaac NPC) which is commented out in Skitia NPCs tp2 and never compiled. Patched extracted copy to remove Isaac banter blocks. No FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME guard in Kale tp2 for Isaac.
sum: Adds Kale as a joinable NPC in BG1 with dialogue and personal storyline.

co.n: Kale NPC for BG1EE and SoD
co.no: LOCAL FIX APPLIED: Kale crossmod file (dialogue/CrossMod/Emily.d) includes banters for Isaac NPC, which is an unreleased NPC bundled in the dev branch of Emily BG1 (Skitia/Emily-BG1). Isaac is NOT in any Emily release (latest: v1.65). Without Isaac installed, WeiDU fails with X3ISAACB.DLG not found. Fix: removed Isaac chains from Emily.d (kept Emily-only banters, lines 1-78). Backup at Emily.d.bak. Automated fix: eet-mod-forge-patches component #16.

3 Foot-Tall-Fury Kit (Requires Lava's Of Paths and Ways)
